vocab.api: Minimal APIs: app.MapGet/MapPost with lambda handlers. Controller APIs: [ApiController] + [Route] attributes. IResult return types.
vocab.database: Entity Framework Core. DbContext with DbSet<T> properties. Migrations: dotnet ef migrations add + update.
vocab.authentication: ASP.NET Core Identity for user management. AddJwtBearer for API auth. [Authorize] attribute or RequireAuthorization().
vocab.validation: FluentValidation or data annotations. ModelState.IsValid in controllers. IValidator<T> injected into endpoints.
vocab.async: async Task<IResult> throughout. CancellationToken parameter for request cancellation. IAsyncEnumerable<T> for streaming.
